lamb-roll-in-the-oven-with-potatoes-and-.name: Lamb Roll In The Oven With Potatoes And Cephalograviera
lamb-roll-in-the-oven-with-potatoes-and-.original_name: Αρνί ρολό στο φούρνο με πατάτες και κεφαλογραβιέρα

ingredients.item: 4 clorin peppers cooked, cleaned and dry
1 medium dry onion, cut in four
4 clorin peppers cooked, cleaned and dry
1 medium dry onion, cut in four

instructions: We ask the butcher for a single piece of lamb, cleared,boned and flattened to be ready for filling. Ideally we prefer saddle, alternative spatter or thigh.
Open it on the kitchen counter and rub it around with lemon juice. Add some olive oil, mustard, Oregon and thyme and rub the whole surface of the beat, to season well.
Spread on the meat the wine leaves, the Florine peppers and the pieces of the cephalogram and wrap it in a roll.
Tie it tight with string to its main shape, brush it externally with minimal oil and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
Put the potatoes on the baking pan. Add the garlic, onion, olive oil, lemon juice, salt, pepper and oregano and mix.
Place the roll on the potatoes and fill the water from the edge of the baking pan – it must half cover the potatoes.
Cover with non-stick paper and seal the baking pan with aluminum foil.
Bake the food in a well preheated oven, at 180°C, in the air, in the medium grill, for about an hour.
Uncover and add the peppers in pieces.
We check the liquids in the pan and, if necessary, fill in some water.
Lower hour intensity to 160
Allow the Lamb roll to stand for 20 minutes and drop its temperature. Cut it into slides and serve with the potatoes.

lasagna-in-the-oven-easily-with-cheeses-.name: Lasagna In The Oven Easily With Cheeses
lasagna-in-the-oven-easily-with-cheeses-.original_name: Λαζάνια στο φούρνο εύκολα με τυριά

ingredients.item: 400 gritted tomato or tomato in juice
350 ml of meat broth or hot water
400 gritted tomato or tomato in juice
350 ml of meat broth or hot water

instructions: Sauté the minced meat in the hot olive oil over high heat for 5′, until golden and dry.
Add the butter, chopped onion, Carrot and sauce for 3′′.
Add the garlic, paste, paprika, oregano, bay left and sauce for 1’.
Add the wine and allow for 1 minute to Evaporate in half.
Add the tomatoes, broth (or water), some salt and pepper. Cover and bottle for 15-20’. The sauce must be juicy.

layered-taco-dip-with-meat.name: Layered Taco Dip With Meat

ingredients.item: Mild taco seasoning mix (such as mccormick®)

instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add ground beef; cook and stir until browned and crumbly, 5 to 7 minutes. Drain and discard grease, then stir in one package of the taco seasoning mix. Let beef cool completely.
While the beef is cooling, stir sour cream, cream cheese, and remaining taco seasoning mix together in a bowl until smooth. Spread over the bottom of a baking dish to cover.
Sprinkle about 1/2 of the Cheddar over the sour cream. Layer with seasoned ground beef, lettuce, and remaining Cheddar. Spoon salsa over the dip. Refrigerate for at least 1 hour before serving.

learn-how-to-make-tomato-soup-with-rice-.name: Learn How To Make Tomato Soup With Rice
learn-how-to-make-tomato-soup-with-rice-.original_name: Aprende a hacer sopa de tomate con arroz
instructions: Coloca las mitades de los tomates en una bandeja para hornear y sazona con aceite de oliva, sal y pimienta.
A purple at 182 been 3 and for 35 minutes or till the skin starts to glow. Once they're ready, remove your skin.
Add the tomatoes and chicken stock to the glass of the blender. He's good.
He's good. For about 40 seconds at high speed. No unliquefied pieces should be left.
The olive oil, onion and garlic are added to a pot with medium heat and purge up to about 5 minutes.
He then incorporates the rice and thyme to soften for 3 more minutes and impregnates his taste.
Gather tomato sauce to rice and salt to taste. Cover the pot and let them cook with low heat for 20 minutes or till the rice's soft.
Meanwhile, add a tablespoon of olive oil to the frying pan and cook cherry tomatoes up to golden. About 3-5 minutes.
Serve tomato soup with rice and with golden and minced parsley tomatoes.

learn-how-to-prepare-a-creamy-black-oliv.name: Learn How To Prepare A Creamed Black Olive pâté
learn-how-to-prepare-a-creamy-black-oliv.original_name: Aprende a preparar un cremoso paté de aceitunas negras

ingredients.item: 150 gr de aceitunas negras sin hueso
2  filetes de anchoa en aceite  ((opcional, pero realzan el sabor))
2 cdas de aceite de oliva  (virgen extra)
1 pint of freshly ground black pepper
1 cdita de tomillo fresco o romero picado
1 cdita de nueces tostadas o almendras molidas ( (opcional, para textura))
1  chorrito de vino tinto seco o brandy  ((opcional))

instructions: Escurre las aceitunas y las alcaparras para eliminar el exceso de salmuera.
Coloca en el vaso de un procesador las aceitunas, el ajo, las anchoas y las alcaparras.
Tritura unos segundos hasta obtener una pasta gruesa.
Add lemon juice, nuts, aromatic herbs and wine.
Processes again while adding olive oil little by little to achieve a creamy texture without its becoming liquid.
Ajusta el punto de sal y pimienta (recuerda que las anchoas ya aportan bastante sal).
Store in an airtight bottle and let at least 30 minutes before serving to integrate flavors.

lebanese-7-spices.name: Lebanese 7 Spices
instructions: {'step': '1', 'instruction': 'Combine nutmeg, ginger, allspice, fenugreek, pepper, cloves, and cinnamon in an airtight container with a lid.'}
{'step': '2', 'instruction': 'Close and shake to mix spices together.'}

leek-dip.name: Leek Dip
instructions: Mix chopped leeks, cream cheese, creamy salad dressing, vinegar, sugar, bacon bits, salt, and pepper together in a medium bowl. Refrigerate until well chilled, about 2 to 3 hours.

lemon-jelly-lezzet.name: Lemon Jelly
instructions: 1. Solve the starch with 1 cup of water and take it in the pot.
2. Cook until the remaining water, sugar, grated lemon peel and lemon juice, stirring constantly in the middle fire.
3. Share from January to bowls or shaped calives.
4. After waiting for 1 night in the refrigerator, turn back to the service plate and serve by decorating the above.

lemon-shrimp-pasta.name: Lemon Shrimp Pasta
instructions: Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil.
Meanwhile, heat olive oil in a large pan over medium heat. Season shrimp with salt and pepper. Cook and stir shrimp in hot oil until opaque, about 2 minutes per side. Remove from heat.
Cook linguine in boiling water until tender yet firm to the bite, 1 to 3 minutes. Drain, reserving 2 tablespoons cooking water.
Combine lemon zest and juice in a small saucepan over medium heat; bring to a simmer. Sprinkle in parsley and stir in butter until melted. Stir in reserved cooking water. Add shrimp to lemon sauce.
Mix together linguine, lemon-shrimp sauce, and Parmesan cheese in a large serving bowl.

lemon-tahini.name: Lemon Tahini

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Whisk tahini, chopped fresh oregano, fresh lemon juice, and 5 tablespoons water in a small bowl, adding more water by teaspoonfuls if too thick. Season to taste with kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

lemony-smoked-trout-tartine.name: Lemony Smoked Trout Tartine

ingredients.prep: sliced avocado, 1 slice multigrain bread, watercress, and sliced Fresno chiles (for serving)

instructions: Whisk shallot, crème fraîche, and lemon juice in a small bowl; season with salt and pepper. Gently fold in trout.
Squeeze lemon wedges over avocado slices and arrange on bread. Top with watercress, trout salad, and chiles.
Do Ahead: Trout salad can be made 8 hours ahead. Cover and chill.

lentil-and-garlic-sausage-cassoulet.name: Lentil And Garlic Sausage Cassoulet

ingredients.item: Good-quality kielbasa sausage or other smoked garlic sausage
Breadcrumbs made from day-old white country bread

instructions: Bring bacon and 8 cups water to boil in a large pot (bacon should be submerged). Attach bay leaf to whole onion by piercing it with cloves; add to pot. Reduce heat to medium. Simmer bacon, turning occasionally, until tender, about 1 hour. Transfer to a plate and let cool. Strain broth through a fine-mesh sieve into a large bowl. Skim off fat from surface and discard.

Combine strained broth and lentils in a large saucepan. If necessary, add more water to cover lentils by 1/2 inch. Bring to a simmer and cook, stirring occasionally, until lentils are just tender but not mushy, 18–20 minutes. Drain lentils, reserving broth. Transfer lentils to a large bowl.

Preheat oven to 375°. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add minced onion, carrots, celery, and cayenne; season with salt and pepper. Cook, stirring occasionally, until vegetables are soft and lightly colored, 7–8 minutes. Add garlic, sage, and thyme; stir for 1 minute. Transfer to bowl with lentils.

Cut skin from cooled bacon; discard skin. Cut bacon crosswise into 1/3-inch-thick slices. Add to lentils; toss mixture gently until well combined. Season with salt and pepper. Transfer mixture to a 3-qt. baking dish.
Distribute sausage evenly over lentil mixture, gently pushing into lentils. Moisten lentils with reserved broth to barely cover (2–2 1/2 cups; add water if needed).

Combine breadcrumbs with butter in a medium bowl; season lightly with salt and pepper. Toss to combine. Sprinkle evenly over lentil mixture; cover dish tightly with foil and place on a rimmed baking sheet.

Bake cassoulet for 45 minutes. Remove foil; bake until breadcrumbs are golden and juices are simmering, 25–30 minutes. Let cassoulet rest for 15 minutes before serving. Sprinkle with parsley and chives; serve with Dijon mustard and cornichons, if desired.

lettuce-cups-with-stir-fried-chicken.name: Lettuce Cups With Stir-fried Chicken
instructions: Arrange lettuce leaves on a large platter. Pour chili sauce into a small bowl; place on platter with leaves. Mix chicken, scallions, soy sauce, and cornstarch in a medium bowl; marinate 10 minutes at room temperature, stirring occasionally. Heat oil in a large nonstick skillet. Add mushrooms; stir-fry 15 seconds. Add garlic and ginger and stir-fry 10 seconds. Add chicken mixture and cook, stirring often, until golden brown and cooked through, about 3-4 minutes. Spoon chicken mixture into lettuce leaves, dividing equally. Garnish with cashews. Roll leaves around filling and dip into chili sauce.

limeabalemon-glaciate.name: Limeabalemon Glaciate
instructions: Blend the ice and banana together in a blender set to Low until mixed, adding the lime juice and lemon juice as it blends to keep the ice from freezing to the side of the blender. Serve in a tall glass and garnish with coconut or a cherry.

loquat-jam-pequerecetas.name: Loquat Jam

ingredients.item: 750 g of peeled and bone free nests

instructions: Clean your necks and remove your skin and bone. To facilitate bone extraction, it's best to peel the fruit before cutting them in half and remove the bone.
Put them in a bowl and let them macerate with sugar, lemon or orange juice for a few hours.
In a pot, cook macerated necks with a tablespoon of water. You can add some species of your choice as ground nail or cinnamon. Cooking for about 20 minutes, occasionally stirring.

During cooking, pounding and squeezing the necks to get a texture with pieces. The jam will be ready at about 105ºC. If you have no thermometer, do the cold plate test to check its consistency: Prepare a small plate or container and place it in the freezer for a few minutes to be cold. Once the jam has been cooked for as long as you think it's ready, remove a small amount with a spoon and pour it onto the cold plate. Wait a few minutes till the jam gets cold and sits on the plate. Then put his finger through the cold jam on the plate. If the jam's ready, I should form a kind of gel or wrinkle as I pass his finger and I should never drip or flow back into the space where you passed his finger. If the jam has failed to achieve the proper consistency, continue to cook it a few more minutes and repeat the cold plate test to get the desired consistency.
Once ready, pour hot jam into sterilized crystal pits and close them hermetically.

lubed-up-hot-wings.name: Lubed-up Hot Wings

ingredients.item: Brown sugar and butter flavored breakfast cereal (such as cap'n crunch®)

instructions: Heat oil in a deep-fryer or large saucepan to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Whisk together eggs and milk in a bowl. In a separate bowl, stir together the bread flour and ground cereal. Coat the wings in the egg mixture, then in the cereal mixture.
Fry the wings, 6 at a time, in the oil until golden brown, 12 to 15 minutes. Let wings drain on paper towels.
Preheat oven to 93°C (95 degrees C). Line several baking sheets with parchment paper.

While wings are frying, mix the melted butter, hot sauce, bourbon, honey, Worcestershire sauce, and habanero sauce in a large plastic tub with a lid. Place the wings into the sauce, close the lid, and shake to coat wings with sauce.
Place the wings on the prepared baking sheets and bake in the preheated oven until the sauce is slightly sticky, about 10 minutes.
